fills.name: Linear RLK Cascade
fills.tokens: TM1_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K TM1_R / SNR_L- KCK_K TM2_R SNR_L- / KCK_K TM2_R SNR_L- KCK_K / FTM_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K FTM_R

fills.name: Group-of-Six Funk
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ SNR_L- TM1_R SNR_L- / KCK_K KCK_K TM2_R SNR_L- / FTM_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K KCK_K / SNR_R+ SNR_L- FTM_R SNR_L-

fills.name: Around the Kit (16ths)
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ SNR_L SNR_R SNR_L / TM1_R+ TM1_L TM1_R TM1_L / TM2_R+ TM2_L TM2_R TM2_L / FTM_R+ FTM_L FTM_R FTM_L

fills.name: Five-Stroke Linear
fills.tokens: TM1_R+ SNR_L- SNR_L- KCK_K / KCK_K TM2_R SNR_L- SNR_L- / KCK_K KCK_K FTM_R SNR_L- / SNR_L- KCK_K KCK_K FTM_R

fills.name: Four-Note Linear (RLLK)
fills.tokens: TM1_R+ SNR_L- SNR_L- KCK_K / TM2_R+ SNR_L- SNR_L- KCK_K / FTM_R+ SNR_L- SNR_L- KCK_K / SNR_R+ SNR_L- SNR_L- KCK_K

fills.name: Linear Funk w/ Hats
fills.tokens: HHT_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K SNR_R / HHT_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K SNR_L- / HHT_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K TM2_R / FTM_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K FTM_R

fills.name: Gospel Six Chop
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ SNR_L- TM1_R SNR_L- / SNR_L- KCK_K TM2_R SNR_L- / FTM_R+ SNR_L- SNR_L- KCK_K / FTM_R+ SNR_L- SNR_L- KCK_K

fills.attribution: RLK bursts separated by rests (uses rest token)
fills.name: Syncopated Bursts
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K . / TM1_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K . / TM2_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K . / FTM_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K .

fills.attribution: Single paradiddle (RLRR LRLL) ×2, accents move to toms
fills.name: Paradiddle Melody
fills.tokens: SNR_R- SNR_L- SNR_R- TM1_R / SNR_L+ SNR_R- SNR_L- TM2_L / SNR_R- SNR_L- SNR_R- FTM_R / SNR_L+ SNR_R- SNR_L- FTM_L

fills.name: Tom Descent (8ths)
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ SNR_L / TM1_R+ TM1_L / TM2_R+ TM2_L / FTM_R+ FTM_L

fills.name: RLK Eighths
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ TM1_L / KCK_K SNR_R / TM2_L+ KCK_K / FTM_R+ FTM_L

fills.name: Eighth-Note Build
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ FTM_L / SNR_R+ FTM_L / SNR_R+ FTM_L / SNR_R+ FTM_L

fills.name: Triplet RLK Roll
fills.tokens: TM1_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K / TM1_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K / TM2_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K / FTM_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K

fills.name: Bonham Triplets
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ FTM_L KCK_K / SNR_R+ FTM_L KCK_K / SNR_R+ FTM_L KCK_K / SNR_R+ FTM_L KCK_K

fills.name: Triplet Tom Roll
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ SNR_L SNR_R / TM1_L+ TM1_R TM1_L / TM2_R+ TM2_L TM2_R / FTM_L+ FTM_R FTM_L

fills.name: Gadd Six (triplet)
fills.tokens: KCK_K SNR_L- TM1_R / SNR_R- SNR_L- KCK_K / KCK_K SNR_L- TM2_R / SNR_R- SNR_L- KCK_K

fills.attribution: One hit per beat, snare down the toms
fills.name: Quarter Tom March
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ / TM1_R+ / TM2_R+ / FTM_R+

fills.name: Quarter Snare/Floor
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ / FTM_R+ / SNR_R+ / FTM_R+

fills.name: Waltz RLK Run
fills.tokens: TM1_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K TM1_R / SNR_L- KCK_K TM2_R SNR_L- / KCK_K FTM_R SNR_L- KCK_K

fills.attribution: Four-per-drum sixteenth roll over three drums
fills.name: Waltz Around the Kit
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ SNR_L SNR_R SNR_L / TM1_R+ TM1_L TM1_R TM1_L / FTM_R+ FTM_L FTM_R FTM_L

fills.name: Waltz Group-of-Six
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ SNR_L- TM1_R SNR_L- / KCK_K KCK_K TM2_R SNR_L- / FTM_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K KCK_K

fills.attribution: RLK + rest per beat across 3/4 (uses rest token)
fills.name: Waltz Bursts
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ TM1_L- KCK_K . / TM2_R+ FTM_L- KCK_K . / FTM_R+ SNR_L- KCK_K .

fills.name: Waltz Tom Eighths
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ TM1_L / TM1_R+ TM2_L / FTM_R+ FTM_L

fills.name: Waltz RLK Eighths
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ TM2_L / KCK_K FTM_R / SNR_L- KCK_K

fills.name: Jazz Waltz Triplets
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ TM1_L- KCK_K / SNR_R+ TM2_L- KCK_K / SNR_R+ FTM_L- KCK_K

fills.name: Waltz Bonham Triplets
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ FTM_L KCK_K / SNR_R+ FTM_L KCK_K / SNR_R+ FTM_L KCK_K

fills.attribution: Three-per-drum triplet roll down the toms
fills.name: Waltz Triplet Roll
fills.tokens: TM1_R+ TM1_L TM1_R / TM2_L+ TM2_R TM2_L / FTM_R+ FTM_L FTM_R

fills.attribution: One hit per beat: snare, mid, floor
fills.name: Waltz Quarter March
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ / TM2_R+ / FTM_R+

fills.name: Waltz Quarter Toms
fills.tokens: TM1_R+ / TM2_R+ / FTM_R+

fills.attribution: Snare / kick / snare across the bar
fills.name: Waltz Quarter Backbeat
fills.tokens: SNR_R+ / KCK_K / SNR_R+
